headline: Zimmer Biomet Wins Three Awards at Healthcare Asia Medtech Awards 2026
summary: Zimmer Biomet (NYSE and SIX: ZBH), a global medical technology leader, today announced it received three awards at the Healthcare Asia Medtech Awards 2026, recognizing the company's innovations across orthopedic product development, digital health and surgeon engagement.
